---
title: "CRC differential entropy figure"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    code_folding: hide
    number_sections: no
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(SingleCellExperiment)
})

source("rules/src/ggtheme.R")
source("rules/src/palettes.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

log_con <- file(snakemake@log[[1]], open = "wt")
sink(log_con)
sink(log_con, type = "message")

out_dir <- snakemake@params$out_dir
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

```

```{r load}
de     <- readRDS(snakemake@input$de)
embeds <- readRDS("crc_embeddings_debug.rds")
sce    <- readRDS(snakemake@params$corrected_sce)
```

```{r de-summaries}
de_nc <- de[c("pt_vs_nc", "ln_vs_nc", "ml_vs_nc", "mp_vs_nc")]

summarize_contrast <- function(df, alpha = 0.05) {
  sig <- df[df$adj_p < alpha, ]
  data.frame(
    upregulated   = sum(sig$moderated_t >= 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    downregulated = sum(sig$moderated_t < 0,  na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

summary_table <- bind_rows(lapply(names(de_nc), function(nm) {
  cbind(contrast = nm, summarize_contrast(de_nc[[nm]]$coefs_df))
}))
write.csv(summary_table, "crc_diffentropy_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r panel-a-removed, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Panel A (DE counts barplot) was removed on 2026-05-03 because it duplicates
# Figure 4F of the manuscript, which is sourced from fig_crc.Rmd single-page
# layout panel F. The underlying CSVs crc_de_counts.csv (single_page) and
# crc_diffentropy_counts.csv (this Rmd) are byte-identical for the columns
# read by both panels.
# Keeping the chunk as eval=FALSE so the figure caption mapping in the
# manuscript stays clear when reading the source.
# To re-instate, add `pa <- ggplot(df_long, ...)` here and put back the
# combined chunk that was removed in the same edit.
```

```{r prop-df}
rd <- embeds$row_data
all_regions <- rownames(rd)

annot_features <- c(
  "pmds_pmd_bin", "hmds_pmd_bin",
  "H3K27me3_chip_bin", "H3K9me3_chip_bin", "H3K4me3_chip_bin",
  "laminb1_lad_bin", "genes_genes_bin",
  "cpgIslandExt_cpgIslandExt_bin",
  "crc01_gain_scna_scna_bin", "crc01_lost_scna_scna_bin"
)

prop_df <- bind_rows(lapply(names(de_nc), function(nm) {
  cf   <- de_nc[[nm]]$coefs_df
  up   <- cf$region[cf$moderated_t >= 0 & cf$adj_p < 0.05]
  down <- cf$region[cf$moderated_t < 0  & cf$adj_p < 0.05]
  is_up   <- all_regions %in% up
  is_down <- all_regions %in% down

  bind_rows(lapply(annot_features, function(ann) {
    ann_vec <- rd[[ann]]
    if (is.null(ann_vec)) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      annotation = gsub("_bin$", "", ann),
      contrast   = nm,
      direction  = c("up",   "down"),
      proportion = c(
        if (sum(is_up)   > 0) sum(ann_vec[is_up]   == 1, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(is_up)   else NA_real_,
        if (sum(is_down) > 0) sum(ann_vec[is_down] == 1, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(is_down) else NA_real_
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
})) %>%
  filter(!is.na(proportion)) %>%
  mutate(contrast_dir = paste0(contrast, "\n(", direction, ")"))

write.csv(prop_df, "crc_diffentropy_annotation_overlap.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r panel-b}
pb <- ggplot(prop_df, aes(x = contrast_dir, y = annotation)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = proportion, color = proportion)) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 5)) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "grey80", high = "red") +
  labs(x = "contrast", y = "annotation",
       size = "proportion", color = "proportion",
       title = "annotation overlap in diff. entropy windows") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r panel-c}
key_anns <- c("pmds_pmd_bin", "hmds_pmd_bin", "H3K27me3_chip_bin",
              "H3K9me3_chip_bin", "genes_genes_bin", "cpgIslandExt_cpgIslandExt_bin")

rd_sce   <- as.data.frame(rowData(sce))
adjS_mat <- assay(sce, "sampen_corrected")

comp_df <- bind_rows(lapply(key_anns, function(ann) {
  in_idx  <- which(rd_sce[[ann]] == 1)
  out_idx <- which(rd_sce[[ann]] == 0)
  if (length(in_idx) == 0) return(NULL)

  col_df   <- as.data.frame(colData(sce))
  in_vals  <- colMeans(adjS_mat[in_idx,  , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  out_vals <- colMeans(adjS_mat[out_idx, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)

  bind_rows(
    data.frame(location = col_df$location, adjS = in_vals,
               overlap = "overlapping", annotation = gsub("_bin$", "", ann)),
    data.frame(location = col_df$location, adjS = out_vals,
               overlap = "other",       annotation = gsub("_bin$", "", ann))
  )
}))

comp_summary <- comp_df %>%
  group_by(annotation, location, overlap) %>%
  summarise(
    median_adjS = median(adjS, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25         = quantile(adjS, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75         = quantile(adjS, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells     = sum(!is.na(adjS)),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )
write.csv(comp_summary, "crc_diffentropy_cell_adjS_by_overlap.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

pc <- ggplot(comp_df, aes(x = location, y = adjS, fill = overlap)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.2, lwd = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ annotation, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(overlapping = "#0072B2", other = "grey70")) +
  labs(x = "location", y = "mean adjS per cell",
       fill = "annotation overlap") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        strip.text  = element_text(size = 6))
```

```{r single-panel-overlap, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1.2)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1.2)$h}
# Single-panel: annotation overlap proportions across contrasts and directions.
# Replaces the legacy combined fig_crc_diffentropy.pdf panel B; manuscript Supp.
# Figure sfig:crc_diffentropy_overlap_props points here.
pb_solo <- pb +
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(2, "mm"),
        legend.text     = element_text(size = 6))

print(pb_solo)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fig_crc_diffentropy_overlap_props.pdf"),
  plot   = pb_solo,
  width  = ng_fig_size(2, 1.2)$w,
  height = ng_fig_size(2, 1.2)$h,
  units  = "in",
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```

```{r single-panel-cell-adjS, fig.width = ng_fig_size(2, 1.5)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(2, 1.5)$h}
# Single-panel: per-cell mean adjS by biopsy location, faceted by overlap status.
# Replaces the legacy combined fig_crc_diffentropy.pdf panel C; manuscript Supp.
# Figure sfig:crc_diffentropy_cell_adjS points here.
pc_solo <- pc +
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(2, "mm"),
        legend.text     = element_text(size = 6))

print(pc_solo)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fig_crc_diffentropy_cell_adjS.pdf"),
  plot   = pc_solo,
  width  = ng_fig_size(2, 1.5)$w,
  height = ng_fig_size(2, 1.5)$h,
  units  = "in",
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```
